headline: Which S&P500 stocks are gapping on Wednesday?
summary: Curious about the market action on Wednesday? Dive into the US markets to explore the gap up and gap down stocks in the S&P500 index during today's session.

headline: 4 Steel Producer Stocks in Focus as Industry Gains on Higher Prices
summary: The strong rebound in steel prices and firm demand in construction and automotive should help Steel Producers industry players NUE, TX, GGB and FSTR to gain.

raw.headline: 4 Steel Producer Stocks in Focus as Industry Gains on Higher Prices

headline: Olin and Huntsman to Merge, Create $12.5 Billion Chemicals Leader
summary: OLN's all-stock merger of equals will create OlinHuntsman, aiming for more than $400 million in synergies and a $12.5 billion revenue base.

raw.headline: Olin and Huntsman to Merge, Create $12.5 Billion Chemicals Leader
raw.summary: OLN's all-stock merger of equals will create OlinHuntsman, aiming for more than $400 million in synergies and a $12.5 billion revenue base.
